text:
Hi! Welcome to the map!
This is infinite whiteboard with areas where I can attach, link and append everything as I desire!

I call this the MTTA system, or Ministry of Toeesh Transport Association

This is a living , breathing replica of my own brain and thought proccess

You can find my thoughts , my previous projects , and what i'm currently up to, All encompassed in these various stations, Some stations even link up to create central stations where joint topics are needed!
